title: Accessibility of Dashboard Widget Colors
excerpt:
Currently in dashboards the color contrast of labels on the colored elements is too small, making it unreadable. 
 
Ideally, the colors are AA compliant — though this could be solvable by letting users choose the colors …

posts.author: juan.valencia (Juan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Currently in dashboards the color contrast of labels on the colored elements is too small, making it unreadable.

Ideally, the colors are AA compliant — though this could be solvable by letting users choose the colors within various widgets (instead of random)
